comment: greedy-bot band for --sim 5000 (make sim). Re-baselined 2026-07-18 after the violence tax landed (batch 4, DECISION.md item 1: +1 light per bump-attack, folded into spend_turn — see VIOLENCE_TAX in src/game.rs): wins 726 (14.5%), deaths_combat 4266 (unchanged from the pre-tax baseline of 729/14.6%/4266 — the greedy bot only fights when routing forces it through a monster, so the tax rarely flips a run's outcome), deaths_dark 8 (was 5, as expected: violence now costs a sliver of the torch too), stuck 0, median win turns 1258, median light left 393, min light left 17. win_pct must stay in [10,25]; deaths_dark band tightened to [2,40] to bracket the new measured value (8) with sane headroom while still catching regressions, and must stay a minority vs combat (enforced in code). Band is calibrated for 5000 seeds; smaller runs can trip the deaths_dark floor. Re-baselining is a balance change: human sign-off required (granted here via DECISION.md item 1). RE-MEASURED 2026-07-19/20 (batch 7 T2, story §9-A: give/use verbs + cheese/coat/towel; sign-off = story §9-A + the batch-7 brief, which pre-authorized this remeasurement): the potion moved from walk-over Consume (instant heal) to Hold+USE (see ItemDef::on_pickup in src/gamedef.rs) — the greedy bot now emits USE (byte 15) whenever hp<=maxhp/2 and the potion is on top of held (headless::sim_seed), and D1/D2 loot slots can now draw cheese instead of potion/sword (BALANCE.loot_bonus_chance), both of which shift item-encounter timing. Measured: wins 849/5000 (17.0%), deaths_combat 4137, deaths_dark 14, stuck 0, median win turns 1274, median light left 393->374, min light left 14, kills_total 57637. win_pct (17.0) and deaths_dark (14) both land INSIDE the existing [10,25]/[2,40] bands with no drift — the ranges below are UNCHANGED, only this comment is updated with the new measured baseline for the record.
